nodes.name: Outer Gate
nodes.description: The portcullis and gatehouse of Candlekeep. Two Tomeguard on duty.

nodes.name: Inner Courtyard
nodes.description: Cloistered limestone square at dusk. A dry well at center. To the east wall, freshly disturbed flagstones half-cover a cracked stone sarcophagus. The inner cloister door is barred.

nodes.name: Scriptorium
nodes.description: Long hall of slanted desks under hanging brass lamps. Locked at dusk; Ily knows how to slip in.

nodes.name: Rookery
nodes.description: Round tower above the courtyard. Ravens roost in the rafters; the floor is whitewashed and noisy.
